text.title: Laravel Layered Patterns (Controller → Service → Resource) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema describing the layering audit artefact for one Laravel module.

section.title: Schema

example.note: 3 fat controllers; 5 inline validations; 8 raw model responses; 2 controller-level transactions; no policies; no services.

forbidden.pattern: Controller method exceeds 20 lines OR contains business logic / transactions.
